criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating given by users on app stores.

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads across platforms.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Features
criteria.description: Presence and effectiveness of AI-powered features such as filters, enhancements, and editing tools.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use andintuitiveness of the app's interface.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech blogs, expert reviews

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: How often the app is updated with new features, improvements, and bug fixes.

criteria.name: Subscription Model
criteria.description: Cost and value proposition of the app's subscription model, if applicable.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, user reviews
